channel.title: Canadian Health Monitor
channel.description: Weekly Canadian EMR, EHR, digital health, privacy, cybersecurity, CIHI, Infoway, and regulatory updates.

item.title: Weekly Canadian Health Monitor Digest - 2026-06-18
item.description:
Top updates
- Canada to create Health Sector Data Space — CIHI named as part of the government’s AI strategy Source: Canadian Institute for Health Information Published: June 10, 2026 Matched keywords: CIHI, health data Link: https://www.cihi.ca/en/news/canada-to-create-health-sector-data-space-cihi-named-as-part-of-the-governments-ai-strategy
